Need to do some researchKim vs. BandenayHumberto Bandenay, TKO, R21000% a guess

Zendeli by decision. *underdog*Powell vs. SordiSimeon Powell, TKO, R1Age advantage for Powell, reach advantage for Powell, Powell by TKO R1.Ferreira vs. BilostenniyRenan Ferreira, TKO, R2Age advantage for Bilostenniy, Massive reach advantage for Ferreira. Ferreira by TKO R2.Magomedov vs. HigoMagomed Magomedov, DECSlight age advantage for Magomedov, Magomedov by decision.Magomedov vs. XavierRasul Magomedov, DECAge advantage for Magomedov. Magomedov by decision to remain undefeated.Bowers vs. de SousaSabrinna de Sousa, DECMore boring WMMA. de Sousa by decision, she will remain undefeated.Kim vs. BandenayHumberto Bandenay, DECKim has a fraud record against average or bad fighters. Bandenay by decision.Santos vs. YanTaila Santos, DECSantos by decision. Boring WMMA.Alvarez vs. LoganAngel Alvarez, TKO, R1Age advantage for Alvarez, Logan has not fight for 1 year and got TKOed in 3 of his last 4 loses. Alvarez by TKO R1.Djantou Nana vs. WilliamsKarl Williams, DECWilliams has more stamina and if this goes to distance he shall be the winner. Williams by decision

posts.author: flavorpacket
posts.body: Predictions: 12 of 12 Pending | Tied for 1st with 619 others i'm not really sure what to make of zendeli. this guy is getting into bloodbath wars and going life and death with everyone but he's still winning for the most part. he doesn't really stand out to me as an uniquely skilled fighter. but he is showing lots of heart and toughness to grind out these wins. with storley his fights are a lot more clear cut. he's either soundly beating the mid level guys who can't wrestle or he's getting destroyed by beasts like thad jean and musaev. * Edited at 04.27.2026, 4:49 PM ET *

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 12 of 12 Pending | Tied for 1st with 619 others Storley vs. ZendeliFlorim Zendeli, DECStorely in his hometown seems like a sure win but he’s badly regressed imo. He was always td or bust but as he’s aged his gameplan has become predictable and ineffective. He’s a very good wrestler but that’s all he’s good at. Storely just wants to lay n pray. He does nk damage on top, has no sub game, can’t strike well, gasses hard, and hates getting hit. He has a great record and consistency but when you look at his record he hasn’t beaten anyone good since MVP 4 years ago. Everyone else has been a regional fighter or someone under matched. They’re not flawless wins either, storely went into cardiac arrest against Po**** and Kikiuri. He is definitely a better wrestler than Florim, but Florim is primarily a wrestler himself so it may cancel out. Florim wins super ugly fights where he gets tuned up and gasses, but he is a dog and fights at a high pace. I kind of think takedowns, pace, and aggression are what you need to beat storely. Maybe he just smudges his way to a win but he has plateaued and idk if he can rely on lay n pray against more complete fighters Rabadanov vs. ChizovGadzhi Rabadanov, SUBNeither of these guys are that good imo. Chizov looked great in pfl europe but he fought two frauds and barely sc****d by Pacella. Hes explosive early and powerful, with a really solid jab but his game feels incomplete. Hes very hittable and stiff, and his defensive wrestling needs work. Gadzhi is super overrated imo, he was sick when he was knocking everyone out, but that was also favorable matchmaking. When he doesn’t get finishes Gadzhi is very passive and thin margins. He showed his old self last fight and got robbed as a result. When he isn’t getting a ko Gadzhi is still good, but extremely pedestrian and very beatable. He will lay n pray, do no damage, and cruise on the feet. This could get ugly if Chizov shows up but I expect Gadzhi to be the better guyPowell vs. SordiSimeon Powell, TKO, R2Sordi back in PFL and on a winstreak is beyond surprising. He was jobbing to get outof his pfl contract and looked like complete ****. He has won some fights but only against equally as bad/washed jobbers. Powell is honestly really **** and a huge waste of physical talent, but he should win this. For one Sordi isn’t going to grapple him. Maybe he shoots a few tds but his wrestling is bad and I think Powrll’s lanky frame will make it difficult. Powell looks like a monster standing by this striking honestly sucks. He doesn’t use his reach and funny enough is really chinny. He got a highway robbery over Xavier and was getting tuned up standing by ACJ of all people. He’s still very young but Powell is honestly a massive fraud. That being said, I think he can mk old man sordi; I imagine he goes don quick once he eats a few big shots hereFerreira vs. BilostenniySergey Bilostenniy, TKO, R1Should be easy for Bilostenniy. When he first came over to the U.S. he was r1 or bust but he’s improved a good amount. His cardio looked great against Blagoy and he got robbed bad against Moldavsky. He is super explosive in r1 but can wrestle as well. His iq needs work but he’s a menace early and has a very good skillset. Renan has more than ran his course; he’s just PFL’s Talisson Teixeira. Sure, he’s a massive human and very dangerous but his actual skillset is horrible. He’s literally just a massive human and that’s it. He’s powerful and big but doesn’t really know how to strike. He’s very hittable and doesn’t fight behind his reach. His ground game is atrocious and once in his back he doesn’t really offer anything. Hes also old now too so we may see that athleticism decline a bit. He can catch Sergey early but if not I think he just gets taken down and owned hereMagomedov vs. HigoMagomed Magomedov, DECGood little Bellator fight here. Magomed is kind of overrated and has declined but he still has the skillset to cruise here. He is thin margins and often fights up/down to his level of comp. He got viciously ko’ed last year as well so that may change his approach. That being sai, for all his flaws I think he should win this fairly easily. Higo is washed and is very much td or bust. His grappling is really high level but he desperately needs to get to the bodylock. Magomed can be take. Down despite the last name but it’s not easy to ground him. I think Higo just gets worked on the feet for 15 minMagomedov vs. XavierRafael Xavier, TKO, R1Tricky one, Rasul is a beast on paper but honestly kind of sucks. His record is crazy and he was an elite freestyle wrestler but he’s looked pretty mid as he’s fought better comp. He is an elite wrestler but against more compete/better guys all he can do is lay n pray. This is a tough fight as well, Xavier is extremely underrated. His wrestling is fine but he can be taken down. His first layer tdd is good though and he is far superior on the feet. Rasul has bad striking and no plan B if takedowns don’t work, I could see an upset here. Xavier has a deceptive record, he’s been robbed a few times and most of his losses came early in his career. He is a sick striker with cardio to brawl for all 15.Bowers vs. de SousaSabrinna de Sousa, DECBowers is super mid yet has made a career out of subbing girl with no ground game. She is an armbar merchant and while she does have a good resume, she is beating girls with white beltkebrm grappling. I don’t even think her overall bjj is that good either, she’s just an armbar from guard merchant. SDS is quite th tough test. We saw last fight she’s still green but she fought a very good prospect and gave her a good fight. SDS showed she’s not flawless but she also displayed great top control, improved striking, and a pretty high pace. I don’t think bowers can outgrapple her an SDS should’ve way too physical. She can easily top time Bowers here and is a better strikerKim vs. BandenayHumberto Bandenay, TKO, R3Super random fight. Cool to see Bandenay back on the big stage; he’s awful and was a complete jobber in the ufc but he has improved and has been grinding his assoff to get back. He’s had some really bad looks and only beaten cans, but his last few have been impressive. Kim is kind of juts a nothing burger who will strike with Bandenay, he should find a finish hereSantos vs. YanTaila Santos, DECRandom ahh fight. Santos is back from her steroid suspension, I’m sure she’s still on the sauce though. She’s shown some very bad signs of regression lately so I’m worried how she looks here. That being said this should be a layup. Yan is a fun fighter and a compete tank of a human but she’s not good. She’s a very strong and physical wrestler but can be taken down easily and doesn’t do the best work on top. She can’t strike either. Santos should show levels here but her cardio has looked terrible lately and she seems checked out. Yan is a gasser and a bad nail though, all santos needs here is tds and she should dominate. Maybe even finds a sub as Yan is a gasserAlvarez vs. LoganAngel Alvarez, TKO, R1Alvarez is a good signing for PFL. Too good for regionals but I don’t think his style would fair that well I. The hfc. He’s kind of like a Yoel Jr. to me, really good athelte with a deep sambo background, yet he chooses to almost entirely strike. He doesn’t strike in conventional patterns either, he explodes in bursts and then goes back to doing nothing; just like Yoel. He’s a good athlete and powerful but he fights close because he does a lot of noting. This should be an easy ko for him. Logan is a wrestler so the takedowns shook cancel out, and on the feet Logan is way too chinnyBye vs. MichelsTaylor Michels, TKO, R2Damn I thought I had escaped this bum Bye. He had one of the lowest level and worst fights I’ve ever seen back as an amateur in Bellator. He somehow decided to stick with MMA and the results are exactly what you’d expect. He is a wrestler but sucks at that, and has no plan B. He is the A side since he’s from Sioux Falls but this guy legit sucks at everything. Taking his opponent blindly, will never pick this jobber ByeDjantou Nana vs. WilliamsKarl Williams, DECTricky one, both ass. Nana has the better record but he’s like 36 and looked like **** when faced with real opponents. He can’t really strike at all and despite the sambo background he’s just not that good at grappling. Williams is an overrated guy because he can wrestle; his wrestling is bad but he knows how to double leg which is enough to win fights. He’s on a terrible skid but has been fighting guys way above his skill level. I thought Williams lowkey got robbed against Popov as well. The wrestling prob sk counters out here and I gotta back Williams as th make capable guy * Edited at 04.28.2026, 7:36 AM ET *

posts.author: Mazeflare
posts.body: Predictions: 12 of 12 Pending | Tied for 1st with 619 others Rewatching the Alfie Davis, I still think Gadzhi did enough to win RD 1, RD 2 and RD 4, with margin for RD 5 but definitelly debatable beyond me how Mercury Davies got the nod unanimously.

posts.author: Mav58
posts.body: Predictions: 7 of 12 Pending | Tied for 1st with 619 others Storley vs. ZendeliLogan Storley, DECThis has Storley decision written all over it. He's a dominant topside grappler but against other good grapplers he plays it safe with ground and pound. Zendeli is a pretty good grappler so I think it will be a cautious fight, but I don't know that he will be able to stop the takedowns.Rabadanov vs. ChizovGadzhi Rabadanov, TKO, R1I fear Gadzhi's knockout streak is over if his confidence is rattled at all, but this is such a huge step up for Chizov and Gadzhi will have something to prove so I think he will be aggressive and look for another knockout. Chizov is a striker though so this could go the distance.Powell vs. SordiSimeon Powell, TKO, R2Idk what to think about Powell. His losses aren't bad, but he didn't look great in them. This should be a favorable matchup for him though. It's nice that Sordi is back on a win streak but he's older and been knocked out several times.Ferreira vs. BilostenniySergey Bilostenniy, DECI think Bilostenniy is sharp enough to survive the massive threat of Renan's power and get the fight to the clinch or the ground. Might even find the finish.Magomedov vs. HigoMagomed Magomedov, DECThe billy goat is back. Magomed has only lost to the cream of the crop in Bellator/PFL, and Higo is good but maybe not quite at that level.Magomedov vs. XavierRasul Magomedov, DECI want to take the upset because Rasul is still unproven, but Xavier hasn't really beat anyone of note either besides Karl.Kim vs. BandenayHumberto Bandenay, DECGotta love Peruvians
